channel.title: Earnings Call Strategic Briefings
channel.description: Weekly strategic briefings distilled from earnings call transcripts. Covers long-term strategy, culture, org structure, and competitive positioning — no quarterly noise.
channel.itunes:author: Arjun's Earnings Agent
channel.itunes:summary: Weekly strategic briefings distilled from earnings call transcripts. Covers long-term strategy, culture, org structure, and competitive positioning — no quarterly noise.

item.title: VEEV Q4 2026 Strategic Briefing
item.description: Veeva Systems Strategic Briefing. Fiscal Q4 2026 Earnings Call. Welcome to this strategic briefing on Veeva Systems. This is your deep dive into what's actually changing at this company, beyond the quarterly noise. We're covering the Vault CRM migration, their AI philosophy, how they think about trust and culture, the evolving product portfolio, and where this company is headed over the next decade. Let's start with the biggest strategic story at Veeva right now: the Vault CRM migration away f...

item.title: VEEV — The Digital Nervous System of Global Pharma
item.description: Veeva Systems: The Digital Nervous System of Global Pharma. A NotebookLM-generated deep dive covering Veeva's role as the operating platform for life sciences — Commercial Cloud, Development Cloud, the Vault CRM migration, competitive dynamics, and long-term investment thesis.
